prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流高校；软科主榜约第55名，信息通信领域顶尖，对高分考生吸引力持续；信息与通信工程A+、计算机科学与技术A、电子科学与技术A-，与招生专业高度匹 配；北邮在信息科技领域声誉正面，抖音热度较高，反映报考关注度升温。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机、通信、电子类专业社会热度持续升温；重庆2026年考生总数预计约35万，物理类占比约63%，竞争环境稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位 次波动、2026年小幅扩招、学校声誉正面及专业热度升温，预计2026年物理类最低位次约4580名，区间4350-4810名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间4350-4810内，建议以二档专业为主力、一档王牌专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次优于4350名可重点冲击通信工程和计算机科学与技术；位次在4500-4700区间以 软件工程、人工智能为稳妥选择；位次接近4810名建议以三档专业保底。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 4200 → 4400 → 4600 → 4450 → 4500, fluctuating within the 4200-4600 range in recent years, with a baseline of about 4500 in 2025; the enrollment plan for Physics Category was about 85-90 students from 2021 to 2025, and about 92 students in 2026, a slight expansion of about 2%, leading to slightly intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 55th on the Soft Science main list, top in the field of information and communication, continuously attracting high-scoring candidates; Information and Communication Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Electronic Science and Technology A-, highly matching the enrollment majors; BUPT has a positive reputation in the information technology field, with high popularity on Douyin, reflecting increased attention for applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of majors such as computer science, communication, and electronic engineering continues to rise; the total number of candidates in Chongqing in 2026 is expected to be about 350,000, with Physics Category accounting for about 63%, maintaining a stable competitive environment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on historical ranking fluctuations, slight enrollment expansion in 2026, positive school reputation, and rising major popularity, the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is predicted to be about 4580, with a range of 4350-4810.

Candidates with rankings better than 4350 can focus on Communication Engineering and Computer Science and Technology; those with rankings between 4500-4700 should consider Software Engineering and Artificial Intelligence as stable choices; candidates near 4810 are advised to use Tier 3 majors as safety.
